regime_history.trigger: SPX broke 200-day MA after four consecutive weekly losses; VIX elevated at 26.78; HY spreads widening to 3.20%; DXY strengthening to ~99.5-100; BTC-SPX correlation rebounding from decoupling low

notes: Rotation log is append-only. Each rotation adds an entry to the rotations array. Regime changes are logged in regime_history.
